query:
SELECT 
  c.id, c.vehicle_registration, c.vehicle_make, c.vehicle_model, c.status,
  a.id AS assessment_id,
  a.pipeline_run_summary,
  a.enriched_photos_json,
  a.damaged_components_json
FROM claims c
LEFT JOIN ai_assessments a ON a.claim_id = c.id
ORDER BY c.id DESC
LIMIT 10
